trid.file_type: file seems to be plain text/ASCII

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert http $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"ET MALWARE Win32/Sehyioa Variant Activity (POST)"; flow:established,to_server; http.method; content:"POST"; http.uri; content:".php?r=cmd"; endswith; fast_pattern; http.header_names; content:!"Referer"; reference:md5,e47a296bac49284371ac396a053a8488; reference:url,www.group-ib.com/blog/oldgremlin; classtype:trojan-activity; sid:2030904; rev:1; metadata:attack_target Client_Endpoint, created_at 2020_09_23, deployment Perimeter, performance_impact Low, signature_severity Major, updated_at 2020_09_23;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: POLICY-OTHER HTTP request by IPv4 address attempt
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tcp any any -> any $HTTP_PORTS ( msg:"POLICY-OTHER HTTP request by IPv4 address attempt"; flow:to_server,established; http_header; content:"Host:",fast_pattern,nocase; pcre:"/^Host\x3a\s*(?:(?:25[0-5]|2[0-4][0-9]|[01]?[0-9]?[0-9])\.){3}(?:25[0-5]|2[0-4][0-9]|[01]?[0-9]?[0-9])\s*:?\s*\d*\s*$/ims"; service:http; reference:url,www.w3.org/Protocols/rfc2616/rfc2616-sec15.html; classtype:policy-violation; sid:50447; rev:1; )

attributes.magic: ASCII text, with very long lines (65536u), with no line terminators

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the execution of whoami.exe with the /group command line flag to show group membership for the current user, account type, security identifiers (SID), and attributes.
